approval_phrase_required: APPROVE IBM RUNTIME REDUCED SCOPE STAGE199 LIVE RUN

excluded: creation of a runnable live-submit command
approval for the original full 4096-shot scope
a noisy-hardware robustness or auditability conclusion
supported: reduced-scope exact approval phrase is isolated from credit attestation
approval phrase matching is only accepted after Stage200 records exact credit attestation
successful review permits only later reduced-scope live-runner preparation review

next_gate: Resolve Stage200 credit attestation first. If the exact reduced-scope approval phrase is then provided, rerun Stage201 and proceed only to reduced-scope live-runner preparation review, not direct submission.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
